user.title: IPMI Connection
user.description: Enter the IPMI add-on URL and connection details for your IPMI host.

data_description.addon_url: URL of the IPMI Control add-on (auto-detected if using Supervisor)
data_description.host: A short name for this host (e.g., menoetius)
data_description.ip: The IP address of the BMC/IPMI interface
data_description.privilege_level: Administrator enables fan mode and threshold control. Operator is read-only.

power.title: Power Control
power.description: Configure power control policy and polling interval.

data_description.power_control: Which power operations are allowed (both, on, off, none)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the BMC for state changes (5-300 seconds)

fan_profile.title: Fan Control
fan_profile.description: Select a motherboard profile for fan mode control.

data_description.motherboard: Select 'none' to skip fan control, or a profile to enable fan mode management

sensor_select.title: Sensor Selection
sensor_select.description: Select BMC sensors to expose in Home Assistant, or enter names manually. Leave both empty to skip.

data_description.manual_sensors: Enter sensor names manually if SDR discovery failed or is incomplete

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate IPMI
reauth_confirm.description: The IPMI credentials are no longer valid. Please enter updated credentials.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure IPMI Host
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for this IPMI host.

error.addon_not_reachable: Cannot reach the IPMI Control add-on. Make sure it is installed and running.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to IPMI host
error.insufficient_privilege: Credentials do not have Administrator access. Select Operator privilege level or use an Administrator account.
error.sdr_query_failed: Failed to query sensors from BMC. You can enter sensor names manually below.

abort.already_configured: This IPMI host is already configured

init.title: IPMI Controller Options
init.description: Adjust power control, polling, and fan profile settings.

sensor_select.title: Sensor Selection
sensor_select.description: Select BMC sensors to expose in Home Assistant, or enter names manually. Leave both empty to skip.

data_description.manual_sensors: Enter sensor names manually if SDR discovery failed or is incomplete

threshold_sensor_select.title: Threshold Configuration
threshold_sensor_select.description: Select sensors to configure threshold overrides for. Only sensors that report thresholds are shown.

sensor_thresholds.title: Thresholds for {sensor_name}
sensor_thresholds.description: Set the threshold values for {sensor_name}. Values are pre-filled from the BMC.
